mentions.note: High-growth pet e-commerce hit hard by war/oil prices; can't recommend buy until war resolves and consumer strength returns.
Concern about pet spending weakness; Cramer thinks Chewy might miss when it reports, similar to Petco miss. Consumer discretionary pressure evident across pet retail.
Down from $48 (June high) to low $20s despite good beat last quarter. Good company, bad stock. MVP anomaly; possible opportunity at depressed valuation. Reports next week; await clarity.
Trading 17x earnings with 8–9% full-year revenue growth guidance; secular e-commerce shift, market-share gains, margin expansion support thesis. Cheapest ever; buy even after 13% bounce.
